title: palicourea hazenii subsp. centroamericana
intro: Palicourea hazenii subsp. centroamericana is a plant species known as a shrub or small tree native to Central America. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Palicourea hazenii subsp. centroamericana include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and treat infections, as well as its antioxidant properties that can protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
